title: AI-driven multi-omics integration for multi-scale predictive modeling of genotype-environment-phenotype relationships
source: Wu et al., Computational and Structural Biotechnology Journal, 2025

L2: AI-driven integration of multi-omics data enables predictive modeling of complex genotype-environment-phenotype relationships
Multi-scale approaches bridge molecular measurements to organism-level phenotypic predictions
L3: Review of AI approaches for integrating multi-omics datasets across scales to build predictive models linking genotype and environmental factors to phenotypic outcomes, advancing precision medicine and systems biology
